title: lathyrus maritimus var. pellitus
intro: Lathyrus maritimus var. pellitus, also known as the sea pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Lathyrus maritimus var. pellitus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestive function, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems.
